message:
feat(cx): enforce INV-MASK-BOUNDED with MAX_MASK_DEPTH=64

Add MAX_MASK_DEPTH constant (64) to task_context and assert mask depth
stays below the bound in Cx::masked() and TaskRecord::increment_mask().
This enforces the formal INV-MASK-BOUNDED invariant: a task's mask
depth must be finite and bounded to guarantee cancellation cannot be
deferred indefinitely.

Includes a #[should_panic] test verifying that exceeding the bound
panics with the expected message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
